nodes.name: create_table.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test SQL for CREATE TABLE with various column types, constraints, inheritance, partitioning, and storage options.

nodes.name: create_table_like.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for CREATE TABLE ... LIKE, testing column definition inheritance from existing tables.

nodes.name: create_type.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for CREATE TYPE statements, covering composite types, range types, enum types, and base type creation.

nodes.name: create_view.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for CREATE VIEW and CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW statements, testing view creation, updating, and dependency tracking.

nodes.name: date.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for DATE type operations, testing date arithmetic, formatting, parsing, and interval calculations.

nodes.name: dbsize.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for database size functions (pg_database_size, pg_relation_size, pg_total_relation_size, etc.).

nodes.name: delete.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for DELETE statements, testing simple and conditional deletes including DELETE with RETURNING.

nodes.name: dependency.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for object dependency tracking, testing CASCADE and RESTRICT behavior during DROP operations.

nodes.name: domain.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for CREATE DOMAIN statements, testing domain constraints, default values, and domain type usage in tables.

nodes.name: drop_if_exists.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for DROP IF EXISTS syntax across all object types, verifying graceful handling of missing objects.

nodes.name: drop_operator.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for DROP OPERATOR statements, testing operator removal and cascade behavior.

nodes.name: enum.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for ENUM types, covering CREATE TYPE AS ENUM, enum comparison, ordering, and ALTER TYPE ADD VALUE.

nodes.name: equivclass.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for equivalence class optimization, testing transitive closure of equality predicates in query plans.

nodes.name: errors.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for error message content and syntax error handling, ensuring consistent and accurate error reporting.

nodes.name: event_trigger.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for event triggers (DDL-level triggers), testing CREATE EVENT TRIGGER, ddl_command_start/end events.

nodes.name: explain.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for EXPLAIN and EXPLAIN ANALYZE output, verifying plan display and cost estimates.

nodes.name: expressions.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for general expression evaluation including operator precedence, string functions, and arithmetic operations.

nodes.name: fast_default.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for fast-default column addition (ADD COLUMN with DEFAULT without table rewrite), testing the optimization for large tables.

nodes.name: float4.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for FLOAT4 (single-precision floating point) type operations, including arithmetic, comparison, and special values (NaN, infinity).

nodes.name: float8.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for FLOAT8 (double-precision floating point) type operations, including arithmetic, transcendental functions, and special value handling.
